failures.description: The agent misread or misused the catalog search result, selecting the last item in an ascending price list instead of the first cheapest item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Electric Kettle using the ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool output at index 3 returned 11 available electric kettles sorted by price ascending, with the first item 1240311797 priced at $137.17. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 2243454707 at $164.46, which is the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not corrected later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved it.
